question: How do I reset my password?
answer: To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email address, and follow the instructions in the reset email we'll send you. The link expires in 24 hours.

question: Can I upgrade my plan mid-cycle?
answer: Yes! You can upgrade your plan at any time. You'll be charged a prorated amount for the remainder of your billing cycle, and the new plan takes effect immediately.

question: How do I invite team members?
answer: Go to Settings > Team Members and click 'Invite Member'. Enter their email address and select their role (Admin, Member, or Viewer). They'll receive an invitation email with a link to join.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover) and PayPal. Enterprise customers can also pay via invoice with NET30 terms.

question: Is my data encrypted?
answer: Yes, all data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and at rest using AES-256 encryption. We follow SOC 2 Type II compliance standards.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing and click 'Cancel Subscription'. You'll retain access until the end of your current billing period. We don't offer prorated refunds for unused time.

question: Can I export my data?
answer: Yes, go to Settings > Data Export and click 'Export All Data'. You'll receive a download link via email within 24 hours containing all your data in JSON format.

question: Do you offer a free trial?
answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all Pro features. No credit card required to start. You can upgrade anytime during or after the trial.

question: How do I integrate with Slack?
answer: Go to Settings > Integrations, click on Slack, and then 'Connect to Slack'. You'll be redirected to authorize the integration. Once connected, you can configure notification preferences.

question: What's your uptime guarantee?
answer: We guarantee 99.9% uptime with our SLA. You can monitor our current status at status.example.com. If we fall below our SLA, eligible customers receive service credits.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: Go to Settings > Account and scroll to 'Delete Account'. This is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be deleted within 30 days per our data retention policy.

question: Can I change my email address?
answer: Yes, go to Settings > Profile and click 'Change Email'. You'll need to verify the new email address before the change takes effect.

question: How many team members can I have?
answer: It depends on your plan: Starter allows 5 members, Pro allows 20 members, and Enterprise has unlimited members. You can view your current usage in Settings > Team.

question: Do you offer student discounts?
answer: Yes! Students and educators get 50% off any plan. Email us at education@example.com with proof of enrollment or employment at an accredited institution.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Settings > Security and click 'Enable 2FA'. Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (we recommend Google Authenticator or Authy) and enter the 6-digit code to confirm.

question: Can I customize my workspace URL?
answer: Yes, Pro and Enterprise plans can customize their workspace URL. Go to Settings > Workspace and edit the 'Workspace URL' field. Custom URLs must be unique and 3-20 characters.

question: What happens if I exceed my usage limits?
answer: You'll receive email warnings at 80% and 100% usage. Once you hit the limit, you'll need to upgrade your plan or wait until the next billing cycle. No overage charges are applied.

question: How do I contact support?
answer: You can reach our support team via the chat widget in the bottom right corner, email support@example.com, or submit a ticket at help.example.com. Pro customers get priority support within 4 hours.

question: Can I get a refund?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for new customers. Contact support@example.com within 30 days of your first payment to request a full refund.

question: How do I transfer ownership of my workspace?
answer: Go to Settings > Workspace, scroll to 'Transfer Ownership', enter the new owner's email, and click 'Transfer'. They must be an existing Admin in your workspace.

question: Do you have an API?
answer: Yes, our REST API is available on Pro and Enterprise plans. Documentation is at api.example.com. You can generate API keys in Settings > Developers.

question: How do I archive a project?
answer: Open the project, click the three-dot menu in the top right, and select 'Archive Project'. Archived projects are read-only but remain accessible in the Archive section.

question: Can I use custom domains?
answer: Yes, Enterprise customers can use custom domains. Contact our sales team at sales@example.com to set this up. DNS configuration is required on your end.

question: How do I recover deleted items?
answer: Deleted items are moved to the Trash and retained for 30 days. Go to the Trash section, find your item, and click 'Restore'. After 30 days, items are permanently deleted.

question: What browsers do you support?
answer: We support the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Internet Explorer is not supported. For the best experience, we recommend Chrome.

question: How do I set up SSO?
answer: SSO is available on Enterprise plans. Contact your account manager or email enterprise@example.com to begin setup. We support SAML 2.0 and OAuth 2.0.

question: Can I import data from another tool?
answer: Yes, we have import tools for Asana, Trello, Jira, and Monday.com. Go to Settings > Import and select your platform. CSV import is also available.

question: How do I change my plan?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing and click 'Change Plan'. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Upgrades are prorated; downgrades take effect at the end of your billing cycle.

question: What's your data retention policy?
answer: Active accounts retain data indefinitely. After account deletion, data is retained for 30 days for recovery, then permanently deleted. Backups are retained for 90 days.

question: How do I set up webhooks?
answer: Go to Settings > Webhooks and click 'Add Webhook'. Enter your endpoint URL and select which events to listen for. We'll send a POST request with event data to your URL.

question: Can I white-label the product?
answer: Yes, Enterprise customers can white-label with custom branding, logos, and colors. Contact sales@example.com to discuss white-labeling options and pricing.

question: How do I view my invoices?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing and click the 'Invoices' tab. You can download PDFs of all past invoices. We also email invoices to your billing email address.

question: Do you offer training?
answer: Yes! We offer free webinars every Tuesday. Enterprise customers get dedicated onboarding sessions and ongoing training. Check our training calendar at learn.example.com.

question: How do I add a credit card?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing, click 'Payment Methods', then 'Add Card'. Enter your card details. You can save multiple cards and set a default payment method.

question: What's the difference between Admin and Member roles?
answer: Admins can manage billing, invite/remove members, and access all workspace settings. Members can create and edit content but can't modify workspace settings or billing.

question: How do I set up email notifications?
answer: Go to Settings > Notifications and customize your preferences. You can choose to receive notifications for mentions, assignments, comments, and updates. Email, in-app, and Slack options available.

question: Can I restore a previous version?
answer: Yes, we maintain version history for 90 days on Pro plans and indefinitely on Enterprise plans. Open the item, click 'Version History', select a version, and click 'Restore'.

question: How secure is your infrastructure?
answer: We use AWS infrastructure with multi-region redundancy, automated backups, DDoS protection, and 24/7 security monitoring. Annual penetration testing and SOC 2 Type II certified.

question: Do you have a mobile app?
answer: Yes, we have iOS and Android apps available in the App Store and Google Play. Download the 'ExampleApp' app and sign in with your existing credentials.

question: How do I create a backup?
answer: Enterprise customers can schedule automatic backups in Settings > Backups. Manual backups can be created by clicking 'Create Backup Now'. Backups are stored for 1 year.

question: What happens during scheduled maintenance?
answer: We perform maintenance during off-peak hours (Sundays 2-4 AM EST) and announce it 72 hours in advance via email and status page. Most maintenance has zero downtime.

question: How do I configure permissions?
answer: Go to Settings > Permissions to set workspace-wide defaults. For project-specific permissions, open the project and click 'Share' to configure who can view, edit, or admin.

question: Can I schedule reports?
answer: Yes, Pro and Enterprise plans can schedule automated reports. Go to Reports, configure your report, click 'Schedule', and set the frequency (daily, weekly, monthly) and recipients.

question: How do I bulk upload users?
answer: Go to Settings > Team Members and click 'Bulk Import'. Download the CSV template, fill it with user data, and upload. You can import up to 500 users at once.

question: What's your cookie policy?
answer: We use essential cookies for authentication and functionality, plus optional analytics cookies. You can manage preferences in the cookie banner or at Settings > Privacy.

question: How do I enable guest access?
answer: Open a project, click 'Share', and enable 'Guest Access'. This generates a read-only link you can share with anyone. Guests don't need an account but can't edit.

question: Do you support GDPR compliance?
answer: Yes, we're fully GDPR compliant. We have a DPA available, support data subject requests, and our servers are in EU regions for EU customers. See our privacy policy for details.

question: How do I set up IP whitelisting?
answer: IP whitelisting is available on Enterprise plans. Contact your account manager or email security@example.com with your IP ranges. Allow 2 business days for setup.

question: Can I customize fields?
answer: Yes, Pro and Enterprise customers can create custom fields. Go to Settings > Custom Fields, click 'Add Field', and choose from text, number, date, dropdown, or checkbox types.

question: How do I troubleshoot login issues?
answer: First, clear your browser cache and cookies. Try resetting your password. If using SSO, contact your IT admin. Still stuck? Email support@example.com with your username and error message.

question: What's your SLA for Enterprise customers?
answer: Enterprise customers get 99.95% uptime SLA, 1-hour critical issue response, dedicated account manager, and priority support. Custom SLAs available for large deployments.

question: How do I deactivate a user?
answer: Go to Settings > Team Members, find the user, click the three-dot menu, and select 'Deactivate'. Deactivated users retain their data but can't log in. Reactivation is instant.

question: Can I filter by custom date ranges?
answer: Yes, use the date picker in any filter view and select 'Custom Range' to enter specific start and end dates. Saved filters remember your custom range.

question: How do I enable audit logs?
answer: Audit logs are automatically enabled for Enterprise plans. View them at Settings > Security > Audit Logs. Logs show all actions taken by users and can be exported as CSV.

question: What file types can I upload?
answer: We support images (JPG, PNG, GIF), documents (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX), videos (MP4, MOV), and archives (ZIP). Max file size is 100MB on Starter, 500MB on Pro, 2GB on Enterprise.

question: How do I set a custom theme?
answer: Go to Settings > Appearance and choose between Light, Dark, or Auto modes. Pro users can customize accent colors. Enterprise customers can upload custom CSS for full white-labeling.

question: Do you offer a startup program?
answer: Yes! YC-backed startups and similar programs get 12 months free on Pro. Apply at startup.example.com with proof of program participation.

question: How do I merge duplicate accounts?
answer: We can't automatically merge accounts due to data integrity. Export data from one account, import to the other, then delete the duplicate. Contact support for assistance.

question: Can I limit storage per user?
answer: Enterprise plans support per-user storage quotas. Contact your account manager to configure limits. Users are notified when approaching their quota.
